heading: Assistance in support of democratic institutions in Poland and Hungary
label: 5451 Assistance in support of democratic institutions in Poland and Hungary
notes: References in TextThe Foreign Assistance Act of 1961, referred to in subsec. (a), is , , . Chapter 4 of part II of the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961 is classified to part IV (§ 2346 et seq.) of subchapter II of chapter 32 of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 87–19575 Stat. 424section 2151 of this titleSept. 4, 1961

children.heading: Authorization of assistance
children.label: a Authorization of assistance
children.text: In addition to amounts otherwise available for such purposes, there are authorized to be appropriated to carry out chapter 4 of part II of the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961 ( and following; relating to the economic support fund) $12,000,000 for the 3-year period beginning , which shall be available only for the support of democratic institutions and activities in Poland and Hungary.22 U.S.C. 2346October 1, 1989

children.heading: Nonapplicability of other laws
children.label: b Nonapplicability of other laws
children.text: Assistance may be provided under this section notwithstanding any other provision of law.
